result.tier_summary: Based on the demo answers, this business appears ready for a funding strategy review and may fit one or more funding paths after documentation is reviewed.

recommended_next_step.label: Request a funding readiness review
recommended_next_step.description: Review recent bank statements, revenue consistency, funding amount, and intended use of funds before matching to a path.

potential_funding_paths.label: Working Capital
potential_funding_paths.fit_reason: The demo profile shows operating history and consistent deposits that may support a working-capital conversation.

potential_funding_paths.label: Inventory or Growth Capital
potential_funding_paths.fit_reason: The stated use of funds is tied to inventory, which can be reviewed against revenue and cash-flow timing.

potential_blockers: Requested amount should be checked against recent revenue and bank activity.
Documentation quality may determine whether the next step is fast review or prep-first.
recommended_documents: Most recent 3-6 months of business bank statements
Inventory quote, invoice, or purchase plan if available
safe_disclaimer: This response is for funding readiness guidance only. It is not an approval, offer, commitment to lend, underwriting decision, or guarantee of funding.
